verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Don't wanna go back, Lord To the way I used to be The way I used to live I won’t go back, Lord To the way I used to be Before you rescued me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will not stop 'til every tribe and nation Bows before You I will not stop 'til they all see your glory See your glory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your fire burns within me Burn within me with Your fire

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lift up your eyes to see The glory of the Lord is on the earth

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Arise, arise Bridge Arise, generation No longer forsaken Arisе, arise, arise
